meaning: n.直升机起飞及降落场,直升机停机坪
examples: Each house had a helipad for a fast evacuation.
The game involves setting flight paths to safely direct jumbo jets to the large runway, smaller prop planes to the airstrip, and helicopters to the helipad.
A helipad leads directly to the suite and a security guard's room in the hallway.
As a last resort in an emergency situation, the home features a helipad on the roof.
If approved, it is estimated the helipad will take 12 weeks to complete.
